audit_items.proof_trace: The property asserts that all dynamic allocations in nfp_nsp.h are freed on every path, but nfp_nsp.h contains zero dynamic memory allocations — only function prototypes, static inline ABI-version comparisons, and struct/enum definitions. The assertion is vacuously true because the quantifier domain (allocations in the header file) is empty. The actual allocations in nfp_nsp.c (nfp_nsp_open, nfp_nsp_command_buf_dma_sg) use correct goto-based cleanup patterns that free all memory on every exit path.
